# Resume Rewrite and Score Lift Playbook

Use these rewrite patterns for the professional coach section. Select the pattern by target role, missing skill, resume section, old-line evidence, and whether the candidate needs a new project or a rewrite of existing experience. Only suggest claims the candidate can honestly explain.

RewritePattern: Domain=AI Engineering | Roles=AI Engineer, ML Engineer, Data Scientist | Skills=Agentic AI, LangChain, LangGraph, tool-calling, RAG | Place=Projects | UseWhen=missing AI agent evidence | Template=Built an agent workflow for {anchor} using {skill}, retrieval context, tool-calling, and response validation to complete a multi-step {role} task with traceable outputs.

RewritePattern: Domain=AI Engineering | Roles=AI Engineer, NLP Engineer | Skills=RAG, vector database, embeddings, FAISS, Pinecone, Chroma | Place=Projects | UseWhen=missing retrieval evidence | Template=Implemented a retrieval pipeline for {anchor} with document chunking, embeddings, vector search, and cited answers, improving grounded recommendations for {role} screening.

RewritePattern: Domain=AI Engineering | Roles=AI Engineer, ML Engineer | Skills=Prompt Engineering, Generative AI, LLM evaluation | Place=Projects | UseWhen=prompt skill appears without proof | Template=Created prompt evaluation cases for {anchor}, comparing outputs for accuracy, hallucination risk, and task completion quality before documenting the best-performing prompt design.

RewritePattern: Domain=AI Engineering | Roles=AI Engineer, ML Engineer | Skills=model evaluation, MLflow, experiment tracking | Place=Projects | UseWhen=model quality is missing | Template=Tracked model experiments for {anchor} using evaluation metrics, error analysis, and decision notes to explain tradeoffs and improve reviewer trust.

RewritePattern: Domain=Machine Learning | Roles=Data Scientist, ML Engineer | Skills=Machine Learning, Scikit-learn, Python | Place=Projects | UseWhen=generic ML keyword needs proof | Template=Built a machine-learning workflow for {anchor} with feature engineering, baseline comparison, and metric-based evaluation, documenting limitations and next improvements.

RewritePattern: Domain=Machine Learning | Roles=Data Scientist, ML Engineer | Skills=TensorFlow, PyTorch, deep learning | Place=Projects | UseWhen=framework listed without model task | Template=Developed a {skill} model workflow for {anchor}, covering data loading, training validation, metric tracking, and error review for a realistic prediction task.

RewritePattern: Domain=Data Analytics | Roles=Data Analyst, BI Analyst, Product Analyst | Skills=SQL, Power BI, Tableau, dashboarding | Place=Projects | UseWhen=analytics proof missing | Template=Built a KPI dashboard for {anchor} using {skill}, defining metrics, cleaning source data, and summarizing trends into business recommendations.

RewritePattern: Domain=Data Analytics | Roles=Data Analyst, Product Analyst | Skills=funnel analysis, cohort analysis, A/B testing | Place=Projects | UseWhen=product analytics proof missing | Template=Analyzed {anchor} funnel performance with {skill}, identifying drop-off points, test hypotheses, and measurable recommendations for conversion improvement.

RewritePattern: Domain=Data Analytics | Roles=Data Analyst, BI Analyst | Skills=Excel, reporting, stakeholder reporting | Place=Experience | UseWhen=old line mentions reports vaguely | Template=Improved reporting for {anchor} using {skill}, standardizing metric definitions and reducing manual review effort for stakeholder decisions.

RewritePattern: Domain=Data Engineering | Roles=Data Engineer, Analytics Engineer | Skills=Airflow, dbt, ETL, ELT | Place=Projects | UseWhen=pipeline evidence missing | Template=Built a scheduled data pipeline for {anchor} using {skill}, adding validation checks, retries, lineage notes, and alerting for failed refreshes.

RewritePattern: Domain=Data Engineering | Roles=Data Engineer | Skills=Kafka, streaming, event pipeline | Place=Projects | UseWhen=streaming skill missing | Template=Created an event pipeline for {anchor} using {skill}, processing source events into validated downstream tables with monitoring and replay notes.

RewritePattern: Domain=Data Engineering | Roles=Data Engineer, BI Developer | Skills=Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, warehouse | Place=Projects | UseWhen=warehouse evidence missing | Template=Modeled analytics-ready warehouse tables for {anchor} using {skill}, documenting grain, joins, quality checks, and dashboard consumption paths.

RewritePattern: Domain=Backend Engineering | Roles=Backend Developer, Software Engineer | Skills=FastAPI, Django, Spring Boot, Node.js, REST APIs | Place=Experience | UseWhen=API proof weak | Template=Built {skill} endpoints for {anchor}, adding validation, database access, error handling, and test cases to improve backend reliability.

RewritePattern: Domain=Backend Engineering | Roles=Backend Developer, Software Engineer | Skills=PostgreSQL, SQL, database design | Place=Experience | UseWhen=database proof weak | Template=Designed database queries and schema changes for {anchor} using {skill}, improving data retrieval consistency and reducing manual reconciliation.

RewritePattern: Domain=Backend Engineering | Roles=Backend Developer | Skills=microservices, service architecture | Place=Experience | UseWhen=architecture signal missing | Template=Separated {anchor} workflows into service boundaries with clear API contracts, reducing coupling and improving maintainability for backend changes.

RewritePattern: Domain=Backend Engineering | Roles=Backend Developer | Skills=Redis, caching, performance | Place=Experience | UseWhen=performance proof missing | Template=Added {skill} caching for {anchor}, reducing repeated database reads and improving response consistency for high-use workflows.

RewritePattern: Domain=Frontend Engineering | Roles=Frontend Developer, UI Engineer | Skills=React, TypeScript, JavaScript | Place=Experience | UseWhen=frontend work generic | Template=Built {anchor} interface workflows using {skill}, adding reusable components, validation states, and API error handling for a smoother user experience.

RewritePattern: Domain=Frontend Engineering | Roles=Frontend Developer | Skills=accessibility, WCAG, keyboard navigation | Place=Projects | UseWhen=accessibility evidence missing | Template=Improved {anchor} accessibility with semantic markup, keyboard navigation, focus states, and documented WCAG checks for critical user flows.

RewritePattern: Domain=Frontend Engineering | Roles=Frontend Developer | Skills=performance, Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse | Place=Projects | UseWhen=performance evidence missing | Template=Optimized {anchor} frontend performance by reducing bundle size, improving image loading, and documenting before/after Core Web Vitals.

RewritePattern: Domain=Full Stack | Roles=Full Stack Developer, Product Engineer | Skills=React, FastAPI, Node.js, PostgreSQL | Place=Projects | UseWhen=end-to-end proof missing | Template=Built an end-to-end {role} workflow for {anchor} using {skill}, covering UI, API, database persistence, validation, and deployment notes.

RewritePattern: Domain=Full Stack | Roles=Full Stack Developer | Skills=authentication, RBAC, authorization | Place=Projects | UseWhen=security workflow missing | Template=Implemented authentication and role-based access for {anchor}, documenting protected routes, permission checks, audit events, and error states.

RewritePattern: Domain=DevOps Cloud | Roles=DevOps Engineer, Cloud Engineer, SRE | Skills=Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Jenkins | Place=Projects | UseWhen=deployment proof missing | Template=Automated deployment for {anchor} using {skill}, adding build validation, environment configuration, rollback notes, and release status tracking.

RewritePattern: Domain=DevOps Cloud | Roles=DevOps Engineer, Cloud Engineer | Skills=AWS, Azure, GCP, Terraform | Place=Projects | UseWhen=cloud proof missing | Template=Provisioned cloud infrastructure for {anchor} using {skill}, documenting networking, IAM, compute resources, cost assumptions, and teardown steps.

RewritePattern: Domain=DevOps Cloud | Roles=SRE, DevOps Engineer | Skills=Prometheus, Grafana, monitoring, observability | Place=Projects | UseWhen=operations evidence missing | Template=Added observability for {anchor} with metrics, logs, alert rules, and incident notes to show reliability ownership.

RewritePattern: Domain=Cybersecurity | Roles=Cybersecurity Analyst, SOC Analyst | Skills=SIEM, Splunk, Sentinel, incident response | Place=Experience | UseWhen=security monitoring proof weak | Template=Triaged {anchor} security alerts using {skill}, documenting evidence, severity, escalation path, and containment recommendations.

RewritePattern: Domain=Cybersecurity | Roles=Security Analyst, GRC Analyst | Skills=vulnerability management, OWASP, risk assessment | Place=Projects | UseWhen=vulnerability proof missing | Template=Created a vulnerability assessment for {anchor}, ranking findings by severity and documenting reproduction steps, business risk, and remediation owners.

RewritePattern: Domain=Cybersecurity | Roles=IAM Analyst, Security Analyst | Skills=IAM, MFA, access review, least privilege | Place=Projects | UseWhen=access control proof missing | Template=Built an access review tracker for {anchor}, identifying stale accounts, privileged roles, missing approvals, and least-privilege remediation actions.

RewritePattern: Domain=QA Testing | Roles=QA Engineer, SDET | Skills=Selenium, Playwright, Cypress, automation testing | Place=Projects | UseWhen=test automation proof missing | Template=Automated regression tests for {anchor} using {skill}, covering critical user journeys, failure evidence, and release-readiness reporting.

RewritePattern: Domain=QA Testing | Roles=QA Engineer, API Tester | Skills=Postman, API testing, contract testing | Place=Projects | UseWhen=API testing proof missing | Template=Built API tests for {anchor} using {skill}, validating authentication, payload schemas, edge cases, and error responses with documented results.

RewritePattern: Domain=QA Testing | Roles=Performance Tester, SDET | Skills=JMeter, k6, load testing | Place=Projects | UseWhen=performance testing proof missing | Template=Created load tests for {anchor} using {skill}, measuring latency, throughput, error rate, and bottlenecks under realistic traffic.

RewritePattern: Domain=Mobile | Roles=Mobile Developer, Android Developer, iOS Developer | Skills=Flutter, React Native, Kotlin, Swift | Place=Projects | UseWhen=mobile app proof missing | Template=Built a mobile workflow for {anchor} using {skill}, covering authentication, API sync, validation states, and device-size testing notes.

RewritePattern: Domain=Mobile | Roles=Mobile Developer | Skills=offline sync, local storage, push notifications | Place=Projects | UseWhen=mobile reliability proof missing | Template=Implemented offline handling for {anchor}, adding local storage, sync conflict notes, push notifications, and release testing evidence.

RewritePattern: Domain=Database | Roles=Database Administrator, Database Engineer | Skills=query tuning, indexing, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server | Place=Projects | UseWhen=DBA performance proof missing | Template=Tuned database performance for {anchor} using {skill}, comparing before/after query plans and documenting indexes, risks, and validation checks.

RewritePattern: Domain=Database | Roles=Database Administrator | Skills=backup, restore, replication, disaster recovery | Place=Projects | UseWhen=DBA reliability proof missing | Template=Designed backup and recovery validation for {anchor}, documenting restore tests, recovery assumptions, and operational readiness notes.

RewritePattern: Domain=IT Support | Roles=IT Support, Helpdesk Analyst | Skills=ticketing, SLA, ServiceNow, Jira Service Management | Place=Experience | UseWhen=support work generic | Template=Resolved {anchor} support tickets using {skill}, documenting issue category, troubleshooting steps, SLA status, and repeat-issue prevention notes.

RewritePattern: Domain=IT Support | Roles=IT Support, Desktop Support | Skills=Active Directory, Office 365, onboarding | Place=Experience | UseWhen=onboarding proof weak | Template=Supported onboarding for {anchor} by configuring accounts, devices, email access, permissions, and checklist evidence for faster employee readiness.

RewritePattern: Domain=System Network | Roles=System Administrator, Network Administrator | Skills=DNS, DHCP, VPN, firewall, routing | Place=Experience | UseWhen=network troubleshooting generic | Template=Troubleshot {anchor} connectivity issues across {skill}, capturing logs, root cause, escalation criteria, and prevention notes.

RewritePattern: Domain=System Network | Roles=System Administrator | Skills=Linux, Windows Server, patching, monitoring | Place=Experience | UseWhen=server support proof weak | Template=Maintained {anchor} servers with {skill}, patch checks, backup validation, monitoring review, and incident documentation.

RewritePattern: Domain=Business Analysis | Roles=Business Analyst, IT Business Analyst | Skills=requirements, user stories, acceptance criteria, UAT | Place=Experience | UseWhen=BA work generic | Template=Converted {anchor} business needs into {skill}, clarifying scope, edge cases, and sign-off criteria for delivery teams.

RewritePattern: Domain=Business Analysis | Roles=Business Analyst | Skills=process mapping, gap analysis, stakeholder management | Place=Projects | UseWhen=process proof missing | Template=Mapped {anchor} current-state process, identified gaps, and prioritized improvements with stakeholder impact and delivery effort notes.

RewritePattern: Domain=Product Project | Roles=Product Manager, Project Manager, Scrum Master | Skills=roadmap, backlog, prioritization, Jira | Place=Experience | UseWhen=delivery ownership weak | Template=Managed {anchor} delivery using {skill}, aligning stakeholders on priority, dependencies, release risks, and measurable outcomes.

RewritePattern: Domain=Product Project | Roles=Scrum Master, Project Manager | Skills=sprint planning, blockers, release readiness | Place=Experience | UseWhen=agile proof generic | Template=Led {anchor} sprint coordination by tracking blockers, dependencies, UAT readiness, and retrospective actions through release completion.

RewritePattern: Domain=UI UX Design | Roles=UI UX Designer, Product Designer | Skills=Figma, wireframes, prototype, user flows | Place=Projects | UseWhen=design proof missing | Template=Designed {anchor} user flows in {skill}, turning requirements into wireframes, prototype states, and handoff notes for engineering.

RewritePattern: Domain=UI UX Design | Roles=UX Designer, Product Designer | Skills=user research, usability testing, accessibility | Place=Projects | UseWhen=user research proof missing | Template=Validated {anchor} design decisions through {skill}, documenting user friction, iterations, accessibility checks, and final recommendations.

RewritePattern: Domain=SAP ERP | Roles=SAP Consultant, ERP Consultant | Skills=SAP MM, SAP SD, SAP FICO, S/4HANA | Place=Experience | UseWhen=SAP module listed without process | Template=Supported {anchor} in {skill}, documenting business process steps, issue root cause, configuration notes, and UAT evidence.

RewritePattern: Domain=SAP ERP | Roles=SAP Consultant, Business Analyst | Skills=functional specification, UAT, defect tracking | Place=Projects | UseWhen=ERP delivery proof missing | Template=Prepared functional and UAT documentation for {anchor}, covering business rules, test scenarios, defects, and stakeholder sign-off.

RewritePattern: Domain=Finance IT | Roles=Finance Analyst, ERP Analyst | Skills=reconciliation, variance analysis, financial reporting | Place=Experience | UseWhen=finance proof generic | Template=Improved {anchor} reporting with {skill}, documenting assumptions, exception checks, and review-ready variance explanations.

RewritePattern: Domain=HR Tech | Roles=HR Analyst, HR Operations, Talent Acquisition | Skills=recruitment funnel, onboarding, ATS, sourcing | Place=Experience | UseWhen=HR process proof weak | Template=Improved {anchor} HR workflow using {skill}, tracking candidate or employee status, turnaround time, and coordination quality.

RewritePattern: Domain=Sales CRM | Roles=Sales Operations, CRM Analyst, Business Development | Skills=CRM, Salesforce, pipeline, lead scoring | Place=Experience | UseWhen=sales proof generic | Template=Improved {anchor} pipeline visibility using {skill}, tracking lead stage, follow-up status, conversion blockers, and next-best actions.

RewritePattern: Domain=Marketing Analytics | Roles=Digital Marketing Analyst, Growth Analyst | Skills=GA4, SEO, campaign reporting, A/B testing | Place=Projects | UseWhen=marketing analytics proof missing | Template=Analyzed {anchor} campaign performance using {skill}, reporting audience, channel, conversion, and optimization recommendations.
# Generated Deep Rewrite Pattern Bank

This section is generated from curated role, skill, placement, and outcome combinations. It gives the coach a broad bank of context-aware rewrite options while preserving the same RewritePattern format used by the app.
